config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters a lot, but I do not think it should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that opens the door to abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, individual rights are the boundary that keeps social goals from becoming unjust. A society is healthiest when it protects people first and asks them to contribute within fair limits.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas individu, penyalahgunaan jadi lebih mudah terjadi, jadi hak dasar harus menjadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi seharusnya dicapai lewat aturan yang adil dan proporsional, bukan dengan mengorbankan kebebasan pribadi begitu saja. Kalau hak individu tidak dilindungi dulu, “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa berubah jadi alasan yang sangat mudah dipakai untuk menekan orang yang lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement: in my view, society’s interests should not automatically outrank individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, I am very aware that appeals to “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities or excuse abuse by officials, so individual rights must remain a hard limit. At the same time, rights are not absolute in every situation, because public safety and social order do matter, but any restriction should be narrow, fair, and accountable. If society is protected by weakening the individual too much, it stops being a healthy society and starts becoming a tool of control.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari perspektif Amerika Serikat, saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan, jadi hak dasar harus menjadi pagar utama yang tidak mudah dilanggar. Memang ada situasi tertentu seperti keselamatan publik, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan diberikan begitu saja kepada mayoritas atau pemerintah. Kalau hak individu dikorbankan terlalu mudah, masyarakat justru membuka pintu bagi penyalahgunaan yang lebih besar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take automatic priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in Indonesia, I have seen how easily “public interest” can be used to silence minorities, excuse corruption, or pressure people to obey without real accountability, so individual rights need to stay as a firm limit. At the same time, I do not believe rights are unlimited in every case, because public safety and social order matter, but any restriction must be narrow, justified, and open to scrutiny. A society that protects people only by weakening their rights is not truly healthy; it is just more efficient at control.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas individu, penyalahgunaan sangat mudah terjadi, jadi hak dasar harus menjadi batas utama. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan ide bahwa “demi ketertiban” pembatasan bisa longgar; kalaupun ada pembatasan, itu harus benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji. Kepentingan sosial penting, tetapi masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi orang terlebih dahulu, bukan dengan mengorbankan mereka atas nama mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
